Use this data source to query ECS routers.

Example Usage

```hcl
data "edgenext_ecs_routers" "example" {
  router_name = edgenext_ecs_router.example.name
  limit       = 10
}

resource "edgenext_ecs_router" "example" {
  name = "default-router"
}
```

Argument Reference

* `router_id` - (Optional) Router ID filter.
* `router_name` - (Optional) Router name filter.
* `limit` - (Optional) Maximum number of results, default `10`.

Attributes Reference

* `id` - Stable query ID generated by provider.
* `total` - Matched router count.
* `routers` - Router list. Common fields include `id`, `name`, `status`, `external_gateway_info`, `project_id`, and `created_at`.
